title: Keysight (KEYS) Validates Fortinet's NGFW Against DDoS Threats
text: Keysight's (KEYS) cybersecurity test platform is expected to help Fortinet tackle the escalating threat of cyber-attacks.

title: Keysight Enables 20 Open RAN Solution Demonstrations for AI, Sustainability, Interoperability and Test Automation at O-RAN ALLIANCE Fall 2023 Global PlugFest
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #5G--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) showcased its open radio access network (Open RAN) solutions leadership at the O-RAN ALLIANCE Fall 2023 Global PlugFest, by demonstrating test solutions for the latest concepts, features and standards that are under development within the Open RAN industry. As wireless networks move to virtualized, disaggregated Open RAN architectures, new test requirements are constantly emerging. Keysight has continued working with.

title: Alphawave Semi Partners with Keysight to Deliver Industry Leading Expertise and Interoperability for a Complete PCIe 6.0 Subsystem Solution
text: LONDON & TORONTO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Alphawave Semi (LSE: AWE), a global leader in high-speed connectivity for the world's technology infrastructure, today announced successful collaboration with Keysight Technologies, a market-leading design, emulation, and test solutions provider, demonstrating interoperability between Alphawave Semi's PCIe 6.0 64 GT/s Subsystem (PHY and Controller) Device and Keysight PCIe 6.0 64 GT/s Protocol Exerciser, negotiating a link to the maximum PCIe 6.0 data rate. title: Keysight: A Look At Recent Developments And Future Prospects
text: Keysight Technologies may experience a return to growth in the second half of 2024 after weaker performance in recent quarters. Challenges such as decreased demand and reduced capital spending persist, but there is potential for growth in the Communication Solutions portfolio. Keysight is well-positioned to benefit from advancements in autonomous driving technology, which could support sustained sales growth.

title: Keysight 400GE Network Cybersecurity Test Platform Validates Fortinet's Hyperscale DDoS Defense Capabilities
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #APSM8400--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) announces that Fortinet chose the Keysight APS-M8400 network cybersecurity test platform to validate the hyperscale distributed denial of service (DDoS) defense capabilities and carrier-grade performance of its FortiGate 4800F next generation firewall (NGFW). The APS-M8400 is the industry's first and highest density 8-port 400GE Quad Small Form Factor Pluggable Double Density (QSFP-DD) network security test platform.

title: Keysight Named to Dow Jones Sustainability Index for Fifth Year in a Row
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #CSR--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) announced it has been named to the Dow Jones Sustainability Index (DJSI) North America for the fifth consecutive year. The DJSI is a widely recognized standard for measuring corporate environmental, social, and governance (ESG) progress across regions and industries. Keysight's continued inclusion on the DJSI showcases its commitment to creating long-term value for business stakeholders while positively impacting the.

title: Keysight Awarded U.S. Air Force Contract for Electromagnetic Spectrum Threat Simulators
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #AirForce--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has received an $18.5 million U.S. Air Force contract to integrate and deliver two Electronic Warfare Threat Simulator (EWTS) systems, with sustainment support consisting of software patch management, field engineer support, non-critical spare parts, critical spare parts, and storage. National defense relies on the electromagnetic (EM) spectrum for radar, communications, enhanced situational awareness, and maneuvering.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for December 4th
text: ENPH, CLMB and KEYS have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on December 4, 2023.
